title: Native Pi TUI worker grid placement
goal: Use the cockpit layout planner to place native Pi TUI workers into a left-side worker grid and preserve daemon-owned result artifacts as the only worker truth.
acceptance: Native Pi TUI worker launches use layout v2 placement: no unused root shell left visible, no default Operator column, and worker panes occupy the left worker region.
For up to 4 concurrent TUI workers, KD records stable worker slot metadata with the cockpit_worker_ready event while keeping source_of_truth as kd_tui_result_artifact.
Worker timeout and cancellation paths still close the associated Herdr pane on a best-effort basis and never read pane text as result evidence.
Existing wrapper/direct fallback behavior remains available when experimental native TUI is disabled or Herdr TUI launch is unavailable.
must_ask_if: The implementation would remove the wrapper/direct fallback path.
Herdr layout constraints require changing the source-of-truth model for worker results.
